movie.actors: Jim Belushi, Christine Tucci, James Handy, Wade Williams
movie.plot: Mike Dooley has been teamed up with Jerry Lee, a German Shepherd dog, for nearly ten years, but Jerry Lee isn't as young as he once was, and Dooley's superiors suggest that maybe it's time ...
movie.title: K-911
movie.writer: Steven Siegel (characters), Scott Myers (characters), Gary Scott Thompson
